prompt: Design a premium macOS desktop app icon for StoryCapture using the 'Lens + Story' direction. Create a cinematic lens-inspired symbol with a subtle narrative cue in the center, like a play-shape or folded ribbon implied inside the optics. The icon should feel precise, premium, dark, and modern rather than playful. No text, no letters, no watermark.
subject: desktop app icon for StoryCapture built around a cinematic camera lens motif with an implied story/play symbol
style: premium product-brand icon, glossy but restrained, crisp edges, polished lighting, suited for macOS and Windows desktop docks
composition: centered square icon composition, single strong symbol, readable at small sizes, no surrounding clutter
lighting: soft studio highlights with subtle depth and glass reflections
palette: obsidian black, graphite, deep plum, restrained electric violet accents
materials: anodized metal, dark glass, subtle lens reflections
constraints: no text, no letterforms, no watermark, no photoreal scene, must read clearly as an app icon
negative: busy background, mascots, cartoons, generic social-media style, flat clipart

prompt: Create matching splash and marketing artwork for the StoryCapture 'Lens + Story' brand direction. Build a cinematic abstract scene around the same lens motif, with motion, focus rings, and subtle narrative flow implying that written stories become polished demo videos. Leave clean negative space on one side for future headline copy. No text, no watermark.
subject: wide brand artwork for StoryCapture based on the same cinematic lens-and-story motif as the icon
style: premium launch artwork, abstract but product-grade, suitable for splash screen, website hero, and press material
composition: wide horizontal composition with one focal object and generous negative space for copy
lighting: dramatic soft glow, controlled reflections, elegant contrast
palette: obsidian, graphite, muted aubergine, controlled neon-violet accents
materials: dark glass, brushed metal, soft volumetric haze
constraints: no text, no UI screenshot, no watermark, must feel premium and cohesive with the icon
negative: stock-photo look, people, laptops, random app windows, clutter

prompt: Design a premium desktop app icon for StoryCapture using the 'SC Monogram' direction. Build an abstract monogram from the letters S and C integrated into frame cuts, timeline geometry, and motion paths, so it feels like storyboarding plus capture rather than plain typography. It should be bold, minimal, geometric, and premium. No text outside the monogram, no watermark.
subject: StoryCapture monogram icon merging S and C with frame and timeline motifs
style: luxury software brand mark, geometric, sharp, dark premium finish, suitable for macOS and Windows desktop iconography
composition: centered square app icon, strong silhouette, excellent small-size legibility
lighting: controlled highlights and subtle dimensional shading
palette: charcoal black, steel gray, warm silver, restrained ember-violet accents
materials: machined metal, satin enamel, subtle glow lines
constraints: only the monogram symbol, no words, no watermark, no excessive detail, must work as a desktop app icon
negative: calligraphy, serif letters, playful startup style, clipart, rainbow gradients

prompt: Create matching splash and marketing artwork for the StoryCapture 'SC Monogram' brand direction. Use the monogram as the hero object within a cinematic abstract composition suggesting story structure, capture, and polished output. Incorporate timeline rhythm, frame edges, and elegant motion lines. Leave negative space for future copy. No text, no watermark.
subject: wide StoryCapture brand artwork built around the SC monogram and timeline/frame visual language
style: premium campaign artwork, abstract product branding, dark editorial-tech feel
composition: wide hero composition, monogram off-center, usable negative space for marketing copy
lighting: precise rim light and soft atmospheric glow
palette: charcoal, smoked steel, dark wine, restrained silver-violet highlights
materials: brushed metal, smoked glass, faint luminous linework
constraints: no text, no watermark, no mock laptop, no generic dashboard screenshot
negative: overly literal camera, stock gradient wallpaper, clutter, random icons

prompt: Design a premium desktop app icon for StoryCapture using the 'Capture Frame' direction. Create a minimal recording-frame symbol with strong corner brackets, a sense of motion or auto-capture, and a polished cinematic finish. It should suggest guided capture and polished output, not security surveillance. No text, no watermark.
subject: minimal app icon built from capture-frame corners and subtle motion cues
style: high-end software icon, minimal but dimensional, sleek and cinematic, designed for desktop dock usage
composition: centered square icon, bold single-symbol silhouette, small-size clarity
lighting: clean edge lighting with subtle depth
palette: deep black, graphite, cool steel, selective magenta-violet energy accents
materials: dark anodized metal, smoked acrylic, faint luminous edge
constraints: no text, no watermark, not a CCTV icon, not a camera emoji, must feel premium
negative: cheap gaming aesthetic, loud neon, surveillance motifs, generic camera glyph

prompt: Create matching splash and marketing artwork for the StoryCapture 'Capture Frame' brand direction. Use the frame-corner motif as the central visual language, with elegant motion trails and cinematic composition suggesting that actions are captured and transformed into polished demo videos automatically. Keep it premium and abstract, with negative space for future copy. No text, no watermark.
subject: wide StoryCapture campaign artwork based on capture-frame geometry and motion trails
style: premium brand artwork, cinematic abstract composition, launch-ready
composition: wide composition with strong frame geometry and open area for headline copy
lighting: subtle cinematic glow, edge highlights, restrained atmosphere
palette: obsidian, graphite, cool steel, magenta-violet accent energy
materials: dark metal, smoked glass, luminous tracing lines
constraints: no text, no watermark, no person, no laptop mockup, no literal screenshot
negative: surveillance themes, bright rainbow gradients, clutter, clipart
